issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case scenarios in the instructions.

scenarios.name: deploy-fargate-service-with-alb
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items, missing only the secrets block, while Response A lacks health checks, secrets, and deployment circuit breaker.

scenarios.name: enable-ecs-service-auto-scaling
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets all rubric requirements; Response B fails to meet key specifications.
